kept.text:
even if you change your email, paypal will still dox your name and potentially your billing address unless you tinker with the default settings

this can happen with business accounts too, and both client and artist always run at risk of potentially giving out sensitive info

author.name: tunasub012
author.description: 21 (Not a sub) PAYPAL ONLY

kept.text:
If you didn’t grow up rich or connected, listen.

You don’t win alone

Most people think success means “I have to own everything” or “I’ll do it myself.”

That mindset will slow you down.

Look at companies like PayPal, Alibaba, or Facebook.

They weren’t built by one person.

They were built by groups, co-founders, early teams, partners.

People who shared ownership… and shared the upside.

That’s the part nobody talks about.

Success isn’t just about control.
It’s about participation in something that grows.

If you don’t have access, you have to build it:
– Connect with people who think bigger than you
– Work with people who are serious
– Learn from those ahead of you

Stop trying to do everything alone.

You don’t need 100% of something small.
You need a piece of something that can become big.

Collaboration will change your life.

tweet.text:
4/28 | Notable Inside Days: $NVDA, $GOOGL, $PYPL, $FIG, $EBAY (x2), $SNAP, $FSLR, $CRM

NOTES:
* $SPY bear gap open but 709 held well. Bounced off the 9 on the daily but is under the 9 and 20 on 65m with the 9 crossing under the 20. Good buying into EOD touching 712 again. 709 remains a key level to hold
* $AAPL earnings Thursday, but created an island bottom today. Would like to see a break and hold of 272 into earnings
* $MSFT earnings tomorrow, bear gap still open to 432.78
* $NVDA bear gap operand inside day. Would like to see 210 and 211.60 hold as support for another move higher. Under 210 is 207, 204, and 200 as support
* $META earnings tomorrow
* $GOOGL earnings tomorrow, with a TL formed on 65m above previous ATH. Looking primed for a another breakout which can be earnings influenced 
* $NFLX another great bounce off of 90.80 and back at 92.50 level. Breaking is back to 94.29 and can fill the small bear gap to 95. Beautiful hammer on daily 
* $AMZN earnings tomorrow, consolidating above previous ATH same as GOOGL 
* $TSLA good buying off open and run to 382.75, but has to break that high from Friday to fill the bear gap

INSIDE DAY LONG IDEA - $NVDA:
- 220C on break of 214.73. PT 216.83, 220

INSIDE DAY SHORT IDEA - $PYPL:
- 49P on loss of 49.40. PT 49, 48.50
